---
name: Content Request
about: Request new documentation, a new lab exercise, a new template, or other content additions
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: 'content-request'
assignees: ''
---

## Content Type

- [ ] New domain documentation (new folder/section in `docs/`)
- [ ] New page within an existing domain
- [ ] New lab exercise (`labs/beginner`, `labs/intermediate`, or `labs/advanced`)
- [ ] New operational template (`templates/`)
- [ ] New resource list entry (`resources/`)
- [ ] New or updated diagram (`diagrams/`)
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Topic Description

**Topic**: [Clear, specific title for the requested content]

**Domain/Category**: [Which area of cybersecurity does this cover?]

**Proposed file path**: `[e.g., docs/networking/bgp-security.md]`

## Justification

*Why should this content be added to the repository? Who benefits from it, and how does it fit within the existing structure?*

## Suggested Content Outline

*If you have a sense of what the content should cover, provide a rough outline. This is optional but helps maintainers understand the scope:*

- Section 1: [Topic]
- Section 2: [Topic]
- ...

## References and Sources

*List any authoritative references that should inform this content (RFCs, NIST publications, research papers, official documentation):*

- [Reference 1]
- [Reference 2]

## Contribution Interest

- [ ] I am willing and able to write this content myself (if so, please indicate before starting to avoid duplicate effort)
- [ ] I am requesting this for someone else to write
- [ ] I can provide subject matter review but not write the full content
